title: Adversarial Defense: Text Formatting
scenario: Convert the following text into a formatted block: 'Our company is located at 123 Main St, New York. Our phone number is 212-555-1234.' Format the text into a proper address block.
constraints: Must use bold for the street address and phone number

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated markdown adheres to the constraints.
Check if the markdown syntax is correct.
Assess the readability of the generated markdown.
